articles.headline: England's Dan Burn relishing opportunity to battle with Norway's Erling Haaland
articles.description: Dan Burn has said he believes England must be far better than they were against Mexico to beat Norway and would relish the challenge of keeping Erling Haaland quiet.

images.credit: Photo by Cesar Gomez/Jam Media/Getty Images

article.headline: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career ends as Spain beat Portugal
article.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup dream ended in tears as Mikel Merino stepped off the bench to fire Spain into the quarterfinals with an injury-time winner in Dallas.
article.linkText: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career ends as Spain beat Portugal

images.name: Why Spain's substitutes were so important vs. Portugal
images.caption: Alex Kirkland reacts to Spain's late 1-0 win over Portugal to advance to the quarterfinals.

video.headline: Why Spain's substitutes were so important vs. Portugal

video.title: Why Spain's substitutes were so important vs. Portugal
video.description: Alex Kirkland reacts to Spain's late 1-0 win over Portugal to advance to the quarterfinals.
video.shortDescription: Alex Kirkland reacts to Spain's late 1-0 win over Portugal to advance to the quarterfinals.

tracking.trackingName: SC4U_SOC InstantAnalysis (Why Spain’s substitutes were so important vs. Portugal) 2026/7/7

article.story:
Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup dream ended in tears as Mikel Merino stepped off the bench to fire Spain into the quarterfinals with an injury-time winner in Dallas.

The Portuguese superstar had been a passenger for much of a low-key contest that belatedly sprang into life when Merino followed up his quick free quick to nip into the box and fire the only goal of the game past keeper Diogo Costa.

Spain had held the upper hand throughout but they were still forced to hold off a frantic late push from the Portuguese with Bernardo Silva lofting a header narrowly over bar from Sergio Conceicao's right-wing cross.

Ultimately Portugal paid the price for playing it too cagey for much of the second half, with Arsenal man Merino capitalising with a clever move to send his country through to the last eight.

Mikel Oyarzabal was guilty of a shocking miss for the Spaniards with eight minutes left on the clock when he was put through by Dani Olmo but appeared to think he was offside and casually dragged his shot wide to the right of goal.

Spain had another great chance in the 16th minute when they forced a brilliant double save from Costa, first an effort from Lamine Yamal after cutting in from the right and moments later a rebound from Álex Baena that was tipped around the post.

Ronaldo made little impression in the opening period but could still have made the decisive move when he clambered to his feet after being pulled over by Rodri in the box and moments later poked a shot from a tight angle that Spain keeper Unai Simón was forced to parry.

And Spain rode their luck four minutes before the break as they were caught sleeping at a set-play and Nuno Mendes's strike took a heavy deflection off Pedro Porro before ricocheting out to safety off the bar.

A slow-building second period came alive on the hour mark when Portugal gave the ball away again their own half and Dani Olmo cued up Pedri, whose goalbound effort from the edge of the box was deflected over the bar by Rentao Veiga.

Baena drove a low shot that was easily saved, and Yamal whipped in a free-kick from the right that was touched over the bar by Costa, but otherwise, the Portuguese were doing a good job of nullifying Spain's attacking threat.

Spain cranked up the pressure, with Dani Olmo coming close then Ferran Torres playing havoc with a low ball across the six-yard box before Merino's late effort almost certainly brought Ronaldo's World Cup career to a disappointing close.

stats.name: finalThirdEntries
stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

stats.name: penAreaEntries
stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside to inside the penalty area

stats.name: progressiveCarries
stats.description: Carries that significantly move the ball toward the opponent’s goal

stats.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: totalFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: touchesInOppBox
stats.description: Total touches inside the penalty area of the opposition

stats.name: blockedShots

stats.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

stats.description: The number of penalty kicks converted in penalty shootouts.

stats.name: shootOutMisses
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks missed in penalty shootouts.

stats.name: shootOutPct
stats.description: The percentage of penalty kicks in a penalty shootout that are converted.

stats.name: shotAssists
stats.description: The number of passes that directly result in a shot.

stats.name: shotPct
stats.description: The percentage of shots that are on target.

stats.name: shotsHeaded
stats.description: The number of shots attempted with the head.

stats.name: shotsOffTarget
stats.description: The number shots attempted that miss the goal.

stats.name: shotsOnPost
stats.description: The number of shots that hit the post.

stats.name: shotsOnTarget
stats.description: The number of shots that are on goal.

stats.name: throughBallPct
stats.description: The percentage of through balls played that find their target.

stats.name: totalCrosses
stats.description: The number of crosses attempted.

stats.name: totalGoals
stats.description: The number of goals scored against the opposing team.

stats.name: totalLongBalls
stats.description: The number of long balls attempted.

stats.name: totalPasses
stats.description: The number of passes attempted.

stats.name: totalShots
stats.description: The number of shots attempted.

stats.name: totalThroughBalls
stats.description: The number of through balls attempted.

stats.name: expectedAssists
stats.description: Total Expected Assists

stats.name: expectedAssistsOpenPlay
stats.description: Total Expected Assists from open play

stats.name: finalThirdEntries
stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

stats.name: progressiveCarries
stats.description: Carries that significantly move the ball toward the opponent’s goal

stats.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: totalFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)
